test_failures.message:
Assertion with == failed
code:  assert result == [{-2000, 1}, {0, 2}]
left:  [{0, 2}]
right: [{-2000, 1}, {0, 2}]
test_failures.test: test first bucket floors a negative earliest timestamp downwards, not toward zero
